title: Matcha Spring Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Chinese-inspired stir fry made with matcha-infused noodles, vegetables, and your choice of protein.

ingredients.name: Matcha-infused noodles
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Cook the matcha-infused noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced green beans and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the thinly sliced spring onions and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
If using German sausage, add it to the skillet and cook until heated through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the matcha powder and a splash of water until smooth.
Add the matcha mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir-fry everything together.
Season with smoky chili flakes to taste.
Serve the matcha spring noodle stir fry hot, garnished with sesame seeds.
